zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Bernard Brocas於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓時，他的父親Sir John de Brocas42歲，母親Margaret Fettiplace36歲。他於大約1354年與Agnes Vavasour結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1395年9月20日在英國波克夏享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Bernard Brocas于大约1330年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾素坦普頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Brocas42岁，母亲Margaret Fettiplace36岁。他于大约1354年与Agnes Vavasour结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1395年9月20日在英国波克夏享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brocas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  French: locative name from Brocas in Les Landes, SW France.

variants.name: Brookhouse
meanings: English: topographic name for a house by a stream, from Middle English brok(e) ‘brook’ + hous ‘house’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Brookhouse in Laughton (Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Bernard Brocas was born about 1330, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Brocas, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Fettiplace, was 36. He married Agnes Vavasour about 1354. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 20 September 1395, in Berkshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Bernard Brocas est né environ 1330, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Brocas, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fettiplace, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Vavasour environ 1354. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1395, à Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Bernard Brocas um 1330 in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Brocas 42 und seine Mutter Margaret Fettiplace 36. Er hat um 1354 Agnes Vavasour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 20. September 1395 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bernard Brocas è nato il circa 1330 nel Southampton, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Brocas, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Fettiplace, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Vavasour circa 1354. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 20 settembre 1395, nel Berkshire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Bernard Brocasが約1330年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Brocasは42歳，母Margaret Fettiplaceは36歳であった。約1354年にAgnes Vavasourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1395年9月20日にイギリスバークシュアイアで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Bernard Brocas(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Brocas(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Fettiplace(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1354년 Agnes Vavasour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1395년 9월 20일 영국 버크실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bernard Brocas nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Brocas, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fettiplace, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Vavasour aproximadamente 1354. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1395, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Bernard Brocas родился около 1330 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Brocas было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fettiplace, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Vavasour около 1354 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 20 сентября 1395 г. в местности биркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Bernard Brocas nació aproximadamente 1330, en Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Brocas, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Fettiplace, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Agnes Vavasour aproximadamente 1354. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1395, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
